column8: We hope you enjoyed today’s first session and are starting to integrate the teachings. Please share what stood out!

Dr. Jeffrey's knowledge, the depth of his experiences and ability to make that into comprehendible lessons is off the charts. My energy was as well the rest of the day, I felt so energized by everything he wove together
Sound is different from the electromagnetic waves

I am new to all of this, have found there to be "several" nuggets of golden informational revolation engrained within the doctors presentation, and have therefore diverted my efforts into these aspects of human life.
    I am looking forward to the eleven remaining sessions, and am hopeful for the overall continuiation of many more revolations to come !!!

Wow! Hard to put into words but I’m excited to learn more. Excellent intro with history, anatomy, physiology on how we process sound and how binaural beats are found to influence the nervous system, bringing balance to an otherwise reactive state faced with life challenges. That deep breath while listening to binaural beats is my experience confirming a connection has been made, balance restored. Ahhhh!
Celeste Lajeunesse Mb, Ca
I am interested in learning more about how to test for homeostasis without the special equipment.

The class today was incredible.  Shift network really has led the way in offering the most high level courses. Classes are  organized, well supported with the skilled managers allowing the guests to be fully present in their presentations.  Dr. Jeffery Thomas is brilliant and I could listen to him all day.  He is in the height of his passion and his ability to share his knowledge is brilliant.  High level information presented in a very accessible manner.  
Tara Semple Regina, Sask. Canada

Most was a review for me, but I enjoyed listening.   I just wish he would integrate his slides with lecture.  This would make it much more interesting and relevant. e Simply receiving a page of slides the next day is really non-integrative and irrelevant!

very good lession for starters - if you took the first course not a lot of new information - the Dr is still trying to convince the audience that this sound healing stuff is realy working - as it was an expensive course I think the participants are already convinced, otherwise they would not pay that much money -  for further modules I expext more practical stuff
As always a lot of information in a very short time

This module was a wonderful review of the fundamentals. But what I particularly appreciated was all of Rachel's insights into the meanings of the planets and the psychological meanings/applications of the aspects. I'm very excited to be continuing this path of learning with Rachel. (Laura M. Columbus, OH)
Dr. Thompson incredible knowledge and capacity to present the information logical and whole.

I found the review really helpful.  The more Rachel goes over the astrology basics, the more I get it.  I loved that the group is small.  I left the session excited about the future and what we're learning.
More order and focus, could be better yet.

After completing Dr. Thompson's 7-week psychoacoustics course, I was very much looking forward to continuing studies with him. It is an honor and a great privilege to be audience to this brilliant scientist, innovator, healer, and highly genial and generous person doing what he very clearly loves! Module 1 has already made my week better. I was left feeling more positive, relaxed and hopeful about life! Other than that, it was no big thing. :-)

I expected that session one would include some review but there were also some wonderful new insights and deeper understanding  the process of how/why synchronization of hemispheres happens! I'm SO excited for the rest of these classes. And very grateful that in purchasing this second series, that you provided the content from the first series. 
Suni Moon, sound healer/musician/teacher, Milwaukee WI US

I love listening to dr Jeffrey and feel he has a huge amount of very important information and wisdom to teach.  The reason for three stars is that a lot of this first session was revision. I am not complaining about that, because any good teacher , which dr Jeffrey is, knows that repetition is essential for learning and you cannot assume that people remember what what taught last week.  The three stars is because I think Shift isn’t giving him enough time to impart his wisdom. One hour simply isn’t enough time for him to go over fundamentals and teach us the new stuff. I think one and half hours ( at least) and two hours preferable, for him to talk would be much better. I think he would prefer it too. Then have fifteen minutes at the end or half an hour for questions. This would make the course better value as at the moment the cost  of each session is I think about 40 dollars which is quite a lot. I really don’t think an hour each week gives Dr Jeffrey enough time to properly teach an in depth course , which is what he wants to do.

Hi I am Madonna from Brisbane Australia. I first started using Jeffreys music around 2000. I loved how it got me through some tough times. But I only had it on my old iPod. When I saw Dr Jeffrey on the shift network and that he was offering his latest music and know how, I jumped at the chance to be apart of what he might be offering. I so enjoyed the the first session and look forward to all that is on offer with the rest of the series. I love the tracks we have already gotten. They put me in a beautiful place. I have some challenges in my life at present and I know that my brain,body and spirit will benefit from regular use of Jeffrey’s music. The information he passed on in the first session has me very excited for what comes next. I have a friend here in Brisbane who went to America years ago and studied with Dr Thompson and actually had one of his sound beds but not in my time of knowing him. I am looking forward to all the ways that I can immerse myself in this work.
Yay for Dr Jeffrey Thompson

One of the best classes ever!! However, some of the personal stories were a little repetitive especially coming from the previous course. Looking forward to learning more. This is an amazing course. Thank you.
D. Jeffrey Thompson is always an interesting speaker.  The snippet of sound used in class was wonderful and I plan to order that audio.

Dr. Thompson makes complex scientific principles so easy to understand. He is truly a genius who is also so warm and generous. I feel so fortunate to have been his student in the introductory course and now in this amazing advanced one. He is among the very best teachers I have had the pleasure of learning from. Thanks to Shift Network for this great opportunity!  
Mano
Seattle, WA
I like how he shared from his heart his reasons for the course.
How are lives are directed by our life colors and of course how amazing Titanya was

i thought Titanya was glorious.  Such a spirit.  Really cannot wait for the rest.
Donna Eden

Please don't make my opinion public.  Thank you.

I haven't had a chance to integrate any information.  My Internet network went down shortly after starting and then twice after that zoom went down.  So I might have missed something in the orientation.  I will watch the replay.

I have no idea what my colors are and by the first session it seems that I won't know that way. Let me guess with you.  I'm a flaming majenta blue.  I know that's 2 colors.  I bet there's more than 2 as a base.  The circles are dizzying and if that's because of blue then well at least now I know that I never stood a chance down here and I learned that there's nothing I can do about that and all's I could do is cry for a world of people spinning wheels, including myself. 

So by what I know from Donna Eden in that I can move my own energy and clear stuff out and balance; and so I will continue to trace, move around, and learn Titanya's Energy Dance.  I apologize for misspelling T's name if I did. 

I felt dismissed from the class. I received multiple headaches. 

I don't have a Facebook account and I'm not creating one for course studies that are private and for me. 
 I'll participate through Zoom if I am welcomed here.  Oh and saying a general Hello Everyone, Welcome: was not welcoming.  It was a put off to avoid an internal dialog.  Give vague, that's what you get back. I don't know what you want and I'm not guessing or having pie in the sky conversations about nothing.

I will complete the course in silence. 
Just keep pretending that I'm not there and I won't chat by typing either so as to not bother anyone.  If you want to talk with me during class through zoom I guess if it's beyond general information about the class and a response needs to be prompt then you won't hear from me because I miss to much information for trying to take a note that's holding me back in a thought.  I'll try 

If y'all don't want me there then say so. I will not pursue the relationship.

If showing up isn't enough then it's okay if you drop me like a soaking wet sock because it sure feels like a waste of my precious resources right before and as I am dropping the stuff and starting anew.  So I may have set myself back financially for being here but I'm going forward with it with y'all anyway and see what comes from it.

As for Modular 1 being exactly the same as the pitch to get me here.  I'm not impressed in a good way.  All of this is for You Stephanie, Stephen, Titanya, and the other lovely hosts who's names escape me right now.

You're beautiful, hang in there.  I know you can't see me but I'm here.

Oh also on the zoom thing I could only see me as being in class, besides the instructor.  Sorry my camera was turned around and focused on my packing.

If you don't want me to be there at all then say so and I will not attempt to attend a live session and will wait for the replays.   Thanks some more.  Yes i am not pleased and I'm okay with finding out why and releasing it because you might be punching me in the ego and I don't realize it yet 

Bye

I don't know what else to say.  I'm hurt. Dismissed and sad for everyone who would do that because they fear something; change they need for their selves but just won't accept because... Whatever 

Do you Stephen and the whole network including Instructors want me to stay?  Or should I go now. 

The colors don't seem to matter: they're always changing, always there, and that's it   just dance and smile at somebody already.  Bye

I hope that my opinion didn't offend anyone.  💙💜

The wealth of information presented on the overview of the 7Auric layers.
The Celtic Weave exercise.

Basic information was covered today. It feels like a webinar presentation and not much interaction/conversation with the audience. I hope that the next module(s) go more in depth and feel more like a genuine connection, not just reading the material/outline. Hope this helps to improve the quality of programs offered and genuinely helps the presenter to be less of one, and more of a facilitator.
I absolutely love Jamie and her teaching style! Wow, there is so much information here, and it is so well presented. Today's session was fascinating and informative. I'm loving this course already!

I really enjoyed this first session and excited for the next ones. 
Thank you and many blessings to everyone involved.
Excellent foundation for the course and exceptional activation.

I resonated a great deal with the first day’s teachings. It was as if someone was naming the thoughts in my head for the first time, ever. I am excited for the possibility here.
Amber, Florida

I have enjoyed Becca’s sessions before so knew what to expect; my normal light cannabis intake combined with the breathing techniques really put me in a nice place to absorb her guidance! Thank you Becca and Shift Network 🙏🏻
I felt the meditation was a little long. I also had a hard time catching her words. Good thing we have the transcription.

Wonderful experience today. 
Alexandra's sound needs to go up a bit during the meditation

I’ve been listening to Jamie for a long time and received a private session from her more years ago. So, it’s such a delight to be in class with her now.  Full of fun little tid-bits…. I can’t wait to listen to it a few more time before our next class. I don’t want miss anything. Thank you so much 😊 Kasey from Ashland, Oregon
Just the first module, but a lot of good information and insights so far.

I wish I hadn’t gotten so sleepy. I liked the content a lot. I look forward to learning more about sacred geometry and its uses. The color for St Michael’s energy was intriguing. The lesson was packed with new ideas for me.

This was amazing! Every second was filled with valuable knowledge and inspiration.Jamie is a excellent teacher and easy to engage with.I will be looking to look at other courses she will be teaching.I also love the handouts.

Jamie covered so much fascinating information in a short amount of time! I thought I was quite familiar with the energy system, but she offered much, much more with easily understandable descriptions, it blew my mind. Her warm, relatable personality made it feel like an invigorating conversation with a friend. I can't wait for next week!
Jen - Walnut Creek, CA
It was very interesting and I had a very positive experience
For me, it was the gentle and soothing way that we were introduced to the module and were taken through the journey of the exercise.

We had an awesome 45 min meditation which I plan to do
 again as soon as it's available!

I was very excited with the topic  but  a while into the meditation I fell aslip but  I received the blessings subconsciously. Before the session I had been at my Dr’s and  after the meditation  I fell great! I felt better physically  and I am very thankful.

I had problem with the volume  and with the accent but if the volume is a little louder probably the accent piece will be solved.. I tried  cc  but it was too distracting to meso just closed my eyes and listened. 🙏🏼🤟🏼
Alexandra is very good at conveying information clearly with warmth and enthusiasm

It´s time for me to deepen my knowing of sensing and seeing/hearing energies, so I appreciate everything that confirms and leads me further on my never-ending expansion-journey : )
If it is in a joyous way, like I sense it is with Jamie, I´m very glad! thank you!

Jami Butler is an energetic, knowledgable, engaged teacher.  Today's session totally renewed what had become a waning interest in Yoga.  She was able to pull together and interweave several disciplines into one coherent picture.  A lot to take in!!!
It was a great time.  Looking forward to the next modules.  Slept sweet and complete rested.  Knee pain gone.  Ty so much. Much love soaked in
Great energy and content. Not keen on scrolling through the pdf or the low cut top...

I love Alexandra's knowledge and energy. Her volume was a little low though at times making it difficult to hear her.
But the content and meditation was amazing.
The session was comfortable to participate in and the hosts were very helpful. Thank you Lisa and Ann. I look forward to the entire workshop.

It felt like a slow starting. I did not learn anything new. Pepole in this clas are grownups whit experienses alredy. The sound in the meditation was bad: waving and fluctulating. This can happen in a sermonial, mindaltering setting- maybe a problem for online gaderings.
May be take longer time in the meditation feeling each feeling. As a regular meditater I dont have anny strong feelings popping up.
Jamie is so knowledgeable and her teaching method is so upbeat and in the flow. I really enjoyed the first class and have learned so much already! I cannot wait to soak up all that I can!

I had some issues with the video and had to give up watching in the end but I look forward to the replay as I found it very interesting. It also reminded me of some content that I knew but had forgotten about!

Jaime is an incredible teacher.  I feel like an electrician, I had no idea how energy flowed through my body.  Jaime easily broke it down, explained and interacted with us asking questions.  I really enjoy her style and knowledge.

Jamie is an incredible teacher with so much knowledge, information and such passion for the topic that it’s hard not to be enthralled by her and her teachings. She is able to break down the information so I could easily digest it and she’s slows down and answers questions when we are confused or not processing the information she has given. She really takes the time to make sure everyone is understanding. 
Tara G. Patterson, Ca.
It was great having the instructor on live.  The hands-on meditation was wonderful.  I am grateful for all the info on cannabis.

I am so new to energy healing and I thoroughly enjoyed learning about the different chakaras and colour within our bodies. Jamie really simplied it. So amazing.  I am looking forward to our next class
I enjoyed the Angel Class. I am glad that I can listen again, thank you 🙏
First session was powerful exciting to start daily practice
I love the connection between sacred geometry and the Archangels.

I decided to take this course out of curiosity as I'm not a cannabis user...at least not in the past but think I may give it a try.  Some social settings make me anxious so I think I may try cannabis to relax me prior to going.  This course gives me some knowledge and a safe environment to do so and who knows...down the road my anxiety may dissipate without using cannabis.  
Sylvia, Stettler, Alberta, Canada

I am very glad to have found this course as it speaks to me at this time. The activation was inspiring and indepth. As I mentioned on the evening my hearing is such that I lose the sound of some voice tones, therefore the addition of music made my ears stuggle to maintain focus on the works and I lost some of the imagery. I appreciate you taking this on board by saying that you would turn the music down. If this experience was shared by enough people  then would having no music be a possibility. I am fine to go with the majority prefer. Thank you.

This is an absolutely amazing experience. I really got in touch with some tough emotions to process and was able to process them without having to mask them with anti-anxeity medication for the first time in ages. I am very eager to experience the rest of the course. Thank you so much!
Lisa H.

Alexandra's clarity, depth of knowledge, and ability to present the material in a way that felt accessible and meaningful. She has a wonderful presence both when she presents content and when she guides us through the activation processes. Looking forward to future modules. Blessings, S Harrell, Fort Collins CO USA

Alexandra WENMAN is excellent at guiding our activation with such a wonderfully descriptive narrative but it is more than that. We are transformed by her energy and high vibration into an inner world and higher dimensions that most would believe are not possible! I am so grateful to have found this class and Alexandra WENMAN at just the perfect time in my life! I also appreciate that the session is recorded so I can do the activation daily! 
Many Blessings! Jennifer Hudson
The Scared Geometry. I as a numbers person I will be digging deeper.
The sound problems were distracting. The meditation was geared more for trauma victims instead of a broader audience just wanting to flow into a new dimension. My expectations could be misplaced.
Becca was positive and informative. Loved the experential meditation!

The instructor never stopped talking during the lecture nor the meditation.  This didn't allow for any integration or assimilation of the information.  I found it to be very distracting and honestly it was like a non-stop barrage of information and babbling.  While she seemed knowledgeable, this approach was definitely a turn-off.  I've taken tons of new age classes over the years and I have never experienced this before. There is no way I could sit through another 6 weeks of this class.  

Please consider this anonymous.  Thank you.

Mark, Dubai. The first session was meticulously planned and delivered with so much positivity. The session was packets with nuggets of very specific and interesting information. The practice was as always a pleasure to work through. Thank you Becca xoxo
Wonderful presenter, very clear and easy to understand the info. Love the guided meditation, very powerful! Looking forward to the next class!
great first class--Becca is wonderful--I have to watch the replay and the audio breaks up in portions--particularly during the meditation, which is then difficult/distracting for on-going practice.

I am excited because so much of what Becca is teaching is consistent with my experiences and discoveries about what is needed therapeutically to experience emotional freedom and how cannabis can work as an ally with this process.  I can’t wait for Module 2!
What a phenomenl first session! So packed full of information that was so well organized. I’m excited to continue this journey.
I'm familiar with James--he seemed a little all over the place. Hoping it gets better
It was very informative and confirming for me. It was a very nice setting and I am hopeful my camera will work next time.
James has such a loving, kind, energetic soul and love what he teaches!

I love the energy of James Van Praagh.  Although I'm not new to mediumship, so much of what he taught, confirmed things I hold to be true.  I love his suggestion of blindfolding yourself to open your "feeling" senses.  This is a gem!  Loved the meditation of bringing fire into each of our chakras.  Great way to discover which chakras are strong and which ones need healing.  I am so blessed to be in this course.  Can't wait for the next class!

Susan Bilek
The breath-chakra-grounding practice

James gives the best advice especially his KISS advice.  His meditations transmitte you to another world. The class is super easy to understand I just need to get out of my own way and he gives you the tools to accomplish just that! Elaine SJ California
I have been working in the healing field for 40 years and now I feel like I've been waiting for this for a long time! James is so knowledgeable and inspiring so really looking forward to go further

I have always love James Van Praagh’s wisdom and teachings.  This new course takes it to a whole new level of learning.  From just this first module you could see that it addresses students just learning in up to practitioners who have their own businesses.  And by the smiles and engagement in people’s eyes everyone was enraptured with his wisdom.  I liken earning from James to  spending the afternoon with your favorite uncle who is also a lifelong yogi.  His wisdom is ageless and enchanting sprinkled with wit and warmth.

I’m not sure what I got from first module. I’ll go back and watch again maybe it will make sense a second time. I know my type. I’ve taken some somatic classes. I’ve meditated using breath work; that portion felt most beneficial but unclear as to why. I hope to revisit the module before entering into module 2.

Enjoyed the first session. instructor knew the topic well, slides helped clarify big concepts; slide details with model pictorials drove home core messages,  breakout group discussions reinforced how to apply ideas into real situations. 
to help students retain the content, instructor could add specific personal examples, case studies, and real-life client examples.
Questons: what role, if any, does spiritual play into the head, heart, and hara (belly) (conduit between heaven and earth)
model?  
can you say something about how the parasympathetic nervous system and the adrenalins plays in the neuropathways model?

I love hoe James breaks  the process down into basic, understandable steps.  He is so open to the process and flexible in his teaching style.  He is an excellent teacher.  The  zoom format worked great.

Laura from Vancouver BC - I loved the first module. Mr Van Praagh's teaching made me feel relaxed about the journey I am on. He provided very helpful tips and tonight was my first "sitting in the dark". He is very comforting, practical and "down to earth" shall we say. He put my soul at ease and I felt something release. He has a great sense of humour and is very easy easy to listen to.
I was not able to get connected with zoom.
Module 1 was a great start 💜
I would love to have concrete examples of how the body compensates for the fixations.
James has a wonderful energy! He’s very easy to relate to. I wish he had a little bit more structured format in his presentation but overall lovely.
James is such a positive energy force. And Shift is very organized.

Hello,

I'm excited to learn more about the biological/emotional responses to situations that trigger negative reactions within that turn outward. The first Module opened my eyes to observe myself from within, and I'm excited to continue the process of self-observation.
James is a teacher with integrity and heart 💜
A wonderful session -- JVP at his shining best.

Presentation was an interesting enough opening for someone who has signed up for 2 enneagram summits and was introduced to it  over 20 years ago...it did not excite me to continue but I will. ...I think initial break out  groups could be bigger to get folks more excited - and introduced to each other - there were only 3 of us....

I love Marion Gilbert's very gentle style, which belies or underplays the depth and complexity of her teaching. The slides/diagrams were clear and helpful and she offered great insights, both in her talk and in response to questions. There was a lot to take in, which I might have found easier to process if we had stopped for the practical meditation earlier in the session, or perhaps even done two. 
Marianne

James is an exceptional individual.  His soul resonates to the key of love.  I am delighted to have the opportunity to learn under his guidance and looking forward to finding and acknowledging my true soul self.  Mary Ann D
I appreciate that the teacher came to our small group session and gave feedback
I had trouble with zoom.  It didn't show me the slides until I finally found an arrow to click.  I would like to know how to get rid of that and also this blue screen behind me on zoom
I couldn't  be here for it. I asked you if it would be recorded but no one answered me. I wish I could have seen it.
Enthralling, informative and sparked a desire for more! Gives you hope! A practice I will utilize daily and it is just the beginning! Thank you!
The teacher's ability to clarify various drum practices with great enthusiasm was both informative and just plain FUN!
I loved the first module! So much valuable information! I’m looking forward to implementing what I learn in this course.

Gail
Santa Fe

I loved it so much and am so excited about the week's to come!! Christine was an amazing teacher, full of enthusiasm and wisdom. I am sonlooking forward to learning more applicable ways to utilize my sacred drums.

Jennifer S.
Oceanside,  CA

Very engaging, the information given made sense and is applicable. Grateful for the seasonal eating guides and the emphasis on breathing. Excited for next module! 
Cynthia-Cleveland, OH
It was great first  session, we learned a lot of new stuff about drums.
Outstanding!!! The basics were presented in such an accessible, clear way! Zero intimidation factor. I can't wait to see where this new drumming journey leads me!!! Kathy in Colorado
It was fun!

James Van Praagh is a down to earth and loving guide. I'm so excited for the rest of the course! I've taken another Shift Network course and Lisa the host is always so helpful and cheerful. The courses are well organized and I love having access to the transcripts and video replays so I don't have to worry about taking notes and can just be in the moment. Wonderful experience!

So grateful for Module 0!!!
Great to get these lessons with different drums. Helped me feel more confident as a beginner!

Loved it!  Christine made it so warm personal and doable! I too have also thought of myself as unable to produce rhythm.  Lately I have been in a slump due to discovering  my back is deteriorating,  the pain of it along with arthritis, an extended bout with respiratory challenges, a sudden unexpected death in my family and of course the world being left to my children and grandchildren.   I want to learn to meditate, continue prayers of gratitude,  engage my brain with something new.  Christine' native American  flute class did that or me during Covid .  I was a teacher and tutor for more than 34 years.   Christine is a fabulous teacher!  One compliment I got upon receiving major recognition was the title  of a newspaper article written about me indicating that teaching was my way of life...I feel that's true for Christine..she is a model of respect for all her students and teachers but on a worldwide basis definitely making the world a better place!
I love John, have been follwoing for years and doing cleanses. I appreciate his deep knowledge and sometimes humorous but serious explanations Deep Gratitude
I’m so excited for this!  Christine has a great vibe and I look forward to learning from her.
Unfortunately I can't participate live because I work during the day.

It was a fantastic session where Dr. John effortlessly explained the importance of incorporating seasonal foods into our diet to support our microbiome. He shared insightful, science-backed facts on transitioning smoothly from winter to spring, resetting our gut, and eliminating toxins. I thoroughly enjoyed it! Looking forward to learn more practical tips from Dr. John who gained meaningful insights from india which is our common connection .

I really enjoyed session 0. Christine makes it seem so easy and her teaching encourages confidence. I have two drums - gathered by life circumstance - and didn't feel confident in playing either. Now I have an understanding of how they work and am excited to learn more. Today is the Autumn Solstice and I'm going to take my drum into the forest and drum as part of my ceremony.

Perfect! Christine is a great teacher and such a joy to learn from! Her smile and positive attitude make the class so much fun. She explains everything so clearly and completely, and is great about answering all questions. I’m so looking forward to the upcoming sessions and learning as much as I can on my drumming journey. Deb G, Bothell WA
The teacher's love for music is contagious! At the end of the.session we all feel inspired!
He comes across as highly competent and knowledgeable. A clear well organized communicator.  I particularly appreciate the experiential experience of breath work.
All of it stood out.  Made so much sense…

Have done other courses with Christine, she is a wonderful teacher and my go to!! Great introduction class to ease us in. The one drawback at this time of year is the confusion with start time.
The calculator converted the start time for GMT to 7.00, but when I logged on the class had already started, so I missed some of it, and I joined 15 minutes before 7.00! I know you are already in DST, we change on the 30th….what time should I log into the zoom so as not to miss PLEASE??!🌿
Missed the class. We are now on DST and assumed you were as well.  Live and learn!
I enjoyed hearing about how to play on different styles of drums
Christine is wonderful. Her vision and explanations are spot on. Holland’s drum class that I took was a total failure in comparison.
I absolutely loveg this first module! John was extremely present, focused and passionate about sharing the information and I so look forward to the rest of the modules!
The techniques for playing different drums. I was familiar only with buffalo drums, and this class inspired me to explore different drums.

I loved Christines free learning, like play and discover like a kid. Thats what I need for my very traumatized inner girlchild and feminine side. Day before I get my remo frame drum. That was so interessting too, that this drum was feminine and air element and healing. Even if she said that it was so for her, I took it to me. The drum I bought was mean for me. Even all technique and care of diffrents drum. It was fun. Love and blessings..
Christine 's clear explanations and showing us.

Lots of good info, however I was a little lost as this was my first shift course.  Didn't know there were handouts. so was scrambling in my note taking.   Felt I should have known more about the enneagram before taking course.  Really looking forward to somatic component.
I found a few  of the charts Mirian used to be so helpful - from both understanding the Enneagram in a deeper way to the realization for the importance of balance in our lives!

I am happy to learn more about the relation breathing and digesting. I already noticed this for my self, and feel that this is very important.
I
The natural approach and coming more in tune with how nature wants to help us, feels very good. The combination old science and modern science is also very reassuring for me.

Dr. Douillard obviously has a lot of knowledge and experience and would have loved for him to share a little more in the first module.   
The pace could easily have been increased a little - it didn't need to take 45+ minutes to sell the idea of eating seasonally.  

It would also have been good to have made the course materials available in advance of the session starting such that those of us who like to be prepared could have had them printed out for reference.

More time for questions at the end would also have been appreciated.  I had several questions  which were not answered and I got the feeling there were a LOT more.

Audio and video quality were good, something which can plague less experienced organizations, so, thank you for that.

Outside of that, it remains to be see what else is taught in the other modules before I would know how comprehensive this first session was.
Informativ, lehrreich und sympathisch -danke!
Christine stood out!  She's so pleasant, informed and generally cares about her audience/students!
I found it mostly a repeat of my earlier classes. But I’m sure it will get better.

John is so knowledgable, humorous & generally a great presenter.
I have a hard time keeping up with him, so it's great we have the recordings to fall back on!

I enjoyed very minute of it. Teaching clear, light, useful.
🥰

Christine is so enthusiastic and full of joie de vivre, she brings light into these dark times.  Whatever else is being destroyed, she creates a joyful community of people connected by timeless rhythms.        Maja J.
Is it possible to ask questions between modules?

It was amazing! I loved the Chakra meditation and how James infuses personal development and healing insights into his teachings. I am the one who spoke of the flock of birds who came into the trees in my backyard during the meditation the first week, then left instantly when the meditation was over.  This second meeting, I couldn't get my ear phones to work and my neighbor, a flight attendant, was sitting in her backyard as I sat in mine.  I din't want to disturb her with the sounds of our class since she rejuvenates by being outside every chance she gets after being on airplanes during her workweek.  As I pondered that, a little bird flew in the branches above me with some twigs in its mouth.  It didn't know where to go either as it kept watching me and hopped from branch to branch, perhaps building up the courage to fly overhead to continue building a nest just behind me.  I thought that synchronicity was pretty mystical and I decided to go and sit in my garage - there because I had just had pest control in my home to protect my house from scorpions.  Although necessary, it didn't feel good to me to do that.  Telling that was part of my share as I talked about a particular incident when a scorpion had gotten trapped in my bed while I was sleeping and I got bitten in 5 places, and I saw about 20 spots where it had bitten me.  One of the members of our group did an exquisite EFT process with me and it was so great to process my guilt as my concern over not having scorpions in my home.  Amazingly, as I told that story, two of us in the group of 3 could feel the burning of an old scorpion sting on my toe.  That night, amazingly, I got bitten by a scorpion again - after 3 years of only seeing one other scorpion in my home!  I'm still recovering from that bite, and appreciate any helpful energy, uplifting thoughts, or prayers sent my way.  It is definitely synchronistic to me, and I appreciate any insights or guidance that might come to you as you read this.  Just the right amount of venom can be medicine...too much is poison.  I am thinking this might be a metaphor for the world we are living in and our involvement in following all the "scorpions" and "scorpion stings"!  Thanks for reading this far into my story!  Jeanie

How our "belief" bestows itself on one's attitudes, thoughts, behaviors and actions is a foundation of its own. Understanding how you or your patient got to where they are currently, whether it's true or false with reality and recognizing its implications on oneself is paramount so root causation of unresolved issues, be they physical, mental, emotional or spiritual have the potential for resolution.  
Cultivating an open mind with these facts in consideration can lead to moving the "needle" toward understood or realization allowing opportunity toward improved health and wellbeing. 

Most recurring issues are driven by our Belief system which reflect our mental and emotional internal factors. I look forward to exploring this deeper over the next 6 weeks.

The problem comes when presenters use original equipment microphones, some mounted in monitors that are 3 and 4 feet away, and are located in big rooms with rock hard walls.  Presenters need to understand that they cannot sit down in front of their laptop and talk as if they were on the phone.  That doesn't work, especially when the audience is buying the information.  You could help a lot by pointing out to your presenters that they must talk slower, be more pronounced, get closer to the mic or use a better one, and from time to time, pause to help the people taking notes.  I am speaking from the view of a hearing disabled customer who has already spent $600 on Sandra's classes.  Please pass this information along to all of your presenters.  I can't possibly be the only one with hearing loss.    JW

This could also be set up so it was an insert so Christine wouldn't have to keep switching from face on view to over her should.

Christine Stevens occurs like a bright and beautiful light. I experience her as indeed upbeat. Amazingly talented, too! Also as open, willing, available, generous, fun ~ an all-around great person to spend time with. She does a great job and I have learned a lot from her. 

There is some room for improvement. I am sometimes lost in her class, or I feel behind. The material would benefit from being more comprehensively organized. Sometimes it's a bit haphazard or taught too fast, or as happened yesterday, she ran out of time. The teaching would also benefit if the rhythm instructions were broken down and taught more slowly. For example, I understood substitutions but could not figure out subtractions. I couldn't hear what was missing. That could be a me problem, but I like to understand and feel caught up. I needed more time with fills and embellishments, as well. Maybe that is coming. If she could spend a bit more time explaining each skill, what it is, and demonstrating, that would be great. 

At the same time, I can see she has her hands full trying to teach on multiple types of drums, which is a lot for her to do in a short amount of time. It seems reasonable (to me) to ask people in a drumming class to all have the same species of drum for basic learning purposes and to make it less complicated. I happen to have several types of drum so I just keep switching them out when she does. Guessing not everyone does. I really like the "back camera." Great addition.

On the whole, I have learned to love drums and drumming, largely due to Christine Stevens' classes. My experience with her is a win.

column8: I am a bit on the fence about the course, but it’s only the first module, thus it may still may turn out  being an excellent course. First, I would have appreciated a visual representation of the info being taught, in form of slides, as it is common practice. I feel this is especially important in a course that draws people who are likely to not function well, due to all the past and current stressors (likely these stressors have been present for many years or even decades). Presenting information in multiple different ways also addresses the fact that people have different learning style (i.e. auditory, visual, hands on etc). I found the incessant talking during the exercise part of the session incredibly annoying (again, the presenter could have chosen to bring up a slide which maybe a helpful reference for the exercise. There were other more minor things that would have been helpful. I believe it would be go for new course representers to watch a couple of different Shift Network courses in advance of putting their own course together.

column8: The only reason I did not give this session a 5 star rating is because I could not stay for the whole session due to a scheduling conflict.  I look forward to the recording and the practices which will take a few days to get here.  Thank you for this opportunity to tap into the power of the natural world in this time of chaos!
column14: TL Course – Survey Reminder campaign from Draft Workflow 1769921
TL Course – Survey Reminder campaign from Draft Workflow 1769921

column8: I enjoyed learning a new rhythm sequence for the welcoming song Bayeo.  I also liked the smaller group size with more individualized feedback and the video from the back was helpful.

I feel that Mr Levy’s lesson was unorganized .  He spoke on many topics that had little relevance and took aside conversations.  I felt he was all over the place.  I ended up being confused rather than uplifted
The guided exercise was profound!

Sergio explained the why and how the practice would be done. I appreciated the actively doing the practice. I went into a deep state of relaxation.
The breathing help the focus of what needed to be done.
The dream seeding exercise
I love Sergio's classes. i just wish he was easier to follow.
Sergio’s timely teachings in this time of upheaval and change was incredibly enlightening and inspiring.

This Module One was already worth the $349 the entire course costs.
6 more modules to go...
Sergio knows how to convey it very well.

Ives - Belgium

hi, I actually wanted to ask a question. I found the initial session confusing in that I wasn’t really sure how it is going to unfold. Is there homework? Are there guided meditations? Is there a portal where we can find out what we need to do between sessions? It ended quite abruptly yesterday, so do we just wait until next Monday for the next instructions?

Loved the module but...(!)  I need to use the closed captioning on the laptop I use for zoom...speaker volume isn't that great...the closed captioning on the module was...better than nothing but sometimes seemed to slip between the irrelevant & the bizarre:):) I was usually able to guess(?) figure out what was not computing but...if it's done with AI I think yours could use a hard conversation or more training:):):)

I really liked the little chat annotations defining some words. Is a pitty you didn't include every concept, specially those in nahuatl.  It was a lot of information, I knew some of them after reading S.M. books, and still felt it was a lot. I find myself waiting for the transcription to check I did got it all.
It was too quick and more like a flow of information than a structured lecture. Was difficult to follow the topics.

I come a long way and it took some time to fully participate. The last meditation brought me in deep silence and surrender. I went straight to bed right after and slept deeply for the first time in month. Thank you. Zeven weeks should do it for me.
column14: TL Course – Survey Reminder campaign from Draft Workflow 1769921

column8: I have often thought that what is happening now in our nation and in the world is showing us the most terrible thing that could happen, so as to snap us out of our complacency and awaken us to the deadly seriousness of true evil. The lessons of this class are a validation, and a great relief. I am ready.

I most enjoyed when John spoke in his own words rather than reading each page out loud. I also really appreciated when he shared his personal stories.  All the material was excellent and I'm looking forward to the next class.

Absolutely excellent presentation of information that is sometimes difficult to understand for those who do not have a background in science. Lots of good visuals, clear and concise written and spoken summaries of the main ideas, and look at that supplemental reading list!  All of the above points us to innovative techniques and technologies now available to support good health. Finally, a musical component by Andersen and Cacina as an experiential interlude of relaxation and an embodiment of the key concepts. We lived oxygen and nitric oxide in action on a cellular level in real time! Wow 🤩 Kudos to you John Stuart Reid! 👍

Patti from Jonesborough, TN: What stood out was rethinking traditional beliefs surrounding health and healing, i.e. the use of H2O2 in smaller quantities, the introduction of nitrox, how to increase the quantity of RBCs via live music (and pop music is more effective than classical). It's made me more curious about potential benefits of the various light, frequency and vibrational modalities for healing myself at home as well as incorporating these concepts into a business to help others in their own journeys of well-being.
John Stuart Reid is one of my favorite teachers! This is the 3rd course I've taken from him. Everything about is courses and his energy and presentation is terrific!!

The course info stated 90 minutes. This class was 30+ minutes over.  I schedule my time based on information provided. While I love the subject matter, I do have obligations and I respect the time of others. Frustrating when I specifically checked the duration prior to purchase. I'm in the eastern time zone, the first 60 minutes are during my lunch hour. The next 30 required permission from my boss as another employee needs to cover the time I am not available. Respect for others time is paramount. I am disappointed by the lack of respect given to those of us who paid to attend. I also don't have the luxury of free time in my after work hours as family obligations must come first, before study hours. There is a lot of reading, which is to be expected and I have allotted time for that. However I do not have time to also catch up on what I miss after 90 minutes. I do hope this was due to this being the first class and not the standard for the remaining classes.

This is not the usual Shift class. Its a real class, with research references and difficult concepts. I fortunately worked on the intro course every day for a week so I knew what was coming. Its all new and very fascinating to me.
I've taken two of John's courses in the past. I know his style but I was hoping for application ideas and he did not disappoint. Great first class. Can hardly wait for next week.

John is as solid with his research as ever and inspiring, too. His course material informs my work and keeps me enthusiastic about sound healing.. He’s genuinely kind and sincere with everyone. I love hearing Anders voice, also, and watching the interplay with Cacina. A lovely, talented couple.

So much wonderful information, and John Reid is really interesting and pleasant in explaining ideas.   I'm glad to have all of the support materials,  slides, etc, which will be helpful as I review what he presented.   Having the transcript and the ability to view the class again will make a difference in my understanding concepts and making them part of my daily reference in improving my health.

The rating is for the first several "first class" as I work and have to get recordings. Fantastic classes and subject I am somewhat versed in. John's energy as well as Anders and Cacina's is so full of light, genuineness, comfort, wisdom. Turns out Dr. Reid and I share a friend, Master Yukinori Matsushita. Very excited about these classes.

It was a wonderful session. So beautifully put together, flowing seamlessly, and so full of new information. I have loved all of Professor Reid's courses and I am sure I will feel the same way about this one. It's like taking a graduate course in this fascinating subject. And Anders and Cacina are truly amazing! I love this course.

Johnston teaching skills. 
Anders and cacina are the best
Subject matter so important

This wonderful information was well presented. The class was interesting and exciting and packed with information. I'll be happily busy watching the replay and reading the references until the next class. I'm so thrilled about all I'm going to learn over the coming months. Val California

What stood out is John’s ability to break down complex information about chemical interactions and acoustics to make the scientific basics of sound therapy understandable in simple terms in a straightforward way.
For me the chemical explanations in the beginning are too complicated to understand  and follow . But all the more practical stuff concerning healing is fabulous!

Loved the sistra
I was distracted as screen sharing did not I may have bitten off more than I can chew but enjoyed the session loved the music

From Sundari Allampudi - Dallas, TX
The entire session was awesome. However, what was very meaningful was 1) the scientific authentication of the effect and benefits of Nitric Oxide (•NO) and how whole body immersion with Sound produces NO. 2) the very meticulously prepared deck of slides 3) And the beautiful Jouney and the dance between breath and NO that Andes guided with Cacina playing the synthesizer so exquisitely.

It’s quite obvious just how enthusiastic John Stuart Reid is about the subject of sound healing..He is extremely well prepared, a wonderfully skilled teacher, who intends to give each student as much information as they like (i.e. the sheer number of different handouts allows each student to dive deeper, if they so choose). This is my second course with John Stuart Reid. I can highly recommend this very caring teacher to just about everyone

What stood out the most for me is John's kindness and his very obvious desire to help others.  What also stood out is his brilliance.  It will take me a couple more times of listening to it to start to understand the material, as it is not my world.  But I will do so in part because I want to learn it, but also because his kindness invites me to do so.  Thank you, John.  I love listening to Anders and Cachina!

Excited to commence the Advanced Course. The first session was a nice welcome home to the prior and now expanding community. It provided a nice review of prior topics with expansion on oxygen and nitric oxide healing. I love the Q&A that John handles so well. I appreciate it when Anders and Cacina chime in on that portion as well, which they did not have an opportunity to do for this session 1 given the time restrictions. Several of the question askers were very concise and not pontificating. That aids expansion of understanding, not simply rehashing what has been covered. It is tough to moderate and modulate and may be so with this expanded group which has the benefit of the previous modules that were paid separately for by prior enrollees. The meditation portion was exceptionally powerful. I plan to use it often and hope it will be provided as a separate selection in addition to the original recording for Deepening Practices.
The resources provided in Deepening Practices are extraordinary and deeply appreciated. John's generous answering of questions, even after the session in the original series, makes it like a true study seminar with all of us growing knowledge in this timely and valuable topic to benefit all. All in all, a nice balance of old and new and totally inspiring.
JSR is such a loving person that he maktes enjoy every bit of his passion for what he teaches. Happy to be part of this
Fabulous content, professional and personal, absolutely loved it!

JSR goes so far above and beyond what one could reasonably expect from his class that it makes my head spin!  I so deeply appreciate the love and care he invests in all that he shares with us, and the material itself truly is mind-blowing.  Big kudos to SHIFT for hosting JSR.  🙏

Great class, great instructor, great information.

bruce, sequim wa

John is an excellent instructor, presenting information with ease and providing additional information for deeper dive into resources. 
Information is current and relevant and so interesting.
I look forward to learning more !!!

John Stewart Reid is an amazing instructor. He is both knowledgeable and humble, which is what our world needs right now. He is not just a teacher, but a model and a mentor who sets an inspiring example of a person who walks what he talks.

What could be better...
I the beginning it whas very technically and not at all linked on sound yet and it seemed like John wasn't life. He just rode what was on the slide. Finally he was more present and just telling.
His stories out of his experience are far most interesting to me.
I missed some clearer explanation about the machines he uses for his research.
The sound while Anders & Cucina were singing-/was severely disrupted ! I missed it totally.
Session 1 lasted a bit too long. Pity that some people couldn't pose there question in the Q&A !

I'm very happy to be back in this course; I took the foundational course and I've been waiting for this one to start up. It was both a reminder of material we heard before and a moving forward with it.  I love this course!
Nitric oxide and hydrogen healing properties
All excellelnt.  Just SOOOOOO much to absorb.  Will need to relisten again and again.  This is OK by me.

John Stuart Reid is an accomplished scientist, mystic and educator.   His presentation was, as always, professional, well-organized, clear and understandable. He is very 'relatable' and comes across very well, backs up everything with credible research, and handles the Q&A sessions with aplomb. I very much look forward to future sessions in this course and hopefully, there will also be future courses.

There was 1 aspect of the Q&A that needs to be refined & improved. The moderator indicates that you can either raise your hand & ask question, or submit your question via chat.  I submitted my question via chat & then the moderator only took questions from those with raised hand. She did not take 1 written question. This is the 4th Shift course I have taken with John. All of the other courses the moderator took question both written on the chat & from those with hands raised.  Victoria
Module 1 seemed like a review of the topics of the first Cymatics. I look forward to exploring more in-depth topics.

John is the consummate professional, rigorous scientist & researcher as well as a spiritually advanced soul. I’m extremely grateful for his devotion to the expansion of consciousness and the return to the most effective, least invasive organic health care that recognizes the collaboration of all beings involved in this gift of healing 💝

Michi (Copenhagen)
Thank you for the sound meditaton, which have increased my blood circulation.

Overall excellent: John is very personable and  engaging.  He makes the science clear and easy to understand. His "menu" is extensive with  useful, eye-opening and astounding information, super interesting facts, practical, user-friendly "To-Do" items, great guests ---

This is my third course with John Stuart Reid and I have already received such thrilling information that merges beautifully with both my electric medicient studies and my science and spiritual explorations.  Thanks to JSR's brilliance and gently soul, worlds come together seamlessly  in one place through him.  A committed scientist and researcher, he is also a conduit for higher information that inspires the mind, body and soul.  I am honored and thrilled to be under his tutelage.

My apologies for not responding sooner. I wasn't able to take the first module in person, so I watched it recorded.
I took the first course with John, and it opened up a whole new world for me. The topic covered is complex, and while I wish it wasn't presented solely through PowerPoint, I'm not sure there's a better way to do it.
I've enrolled in many courses on The Shift Network over the years. I've enjoyed them all, some more than others, but I can confidently say that this one (the previous one and now the advanced one) will support my health, even if I find it a bit difficult to grasp the level. I can always go back and listen to the modules several times and review the slides.
Super glad I joined!
I always learn something from John despite having studied sound healing for decades. Look forward to the weeks ahead and what ideas will be presented.

I met Sergio in 2010 and since then it is always a pleasure for me to work with him, although I prefer the occasions in which I can be at his side. Gratitude and blessings to Sergio and his Masters and to all the Keepers who have preserved this precious and beloved Toltec-Mexican Tradition.
Laura Piro Xochimiquiztli, Italy

I give Module 1 a 5 rating
I found the instructor to be not only knowledgeable but also kind and caring. 
I look forward to future classes
Anonymous

The first module A Pet Death Doula's Guide to Sacred Transitions was all that I hoped for and more.  As soon as I entered the session just listening to the music and being with other participants brought sacred tears of joy.   
The Monique's clear Presence is heartfelt.
I look forward to the rest of the sessions.
Alorah L.
Good info focusing on animal’s point of view.  Also, it really aligns with my Reiki training
Loving this class. No time to write more now, but a big thumbs up from me!
That was so much fun! What a great opportunity. 💚

WOW! I'm so, so impressed already, and this was only the first class.  I took a lot of notes on her insight into the historical applications of cannabis, and the political/social impact on cannabis use and research, and on further avenues of research for my particular medical condition that can be treated with certain cannabis cultivars I hadn't known about.

When Monique talked about her experiences with grief and her animal companion, Romi. How she was able to work with the grief until her heart broke open and she was flooded with love. Also, when she discussed frequencies and being able to tune into the frequency of love so that you may always be connected to your beloved animals whether they are with you in physical form or spirit form.

The sentence „When we‘re deciding from a place of panic and fear, we‘re deciding what is best for us not what is best for the animal.“ was my biggest take home message and a beautiful reminder to stay connected.
Fabienne, Switzerland

I loved this first class. Monique Is so inviting and only pases peace and calmness. The excercise was beautiful. I dis It in the introduction session when i bought the course and could not stop crying and today i started again crying but soon found a way to calm myself down and get centered. I know now how to start practicing and open a safe space for me to connect with my babies from a place of peace and love. I feel blessed to be able to learn from such a beautiful soul and geneerous teacher as Monique.
This is just the first Module I feel I learned so much and already got my moneys worth amazing teaching from an incredible teacher.

I just loved the session. Only thing as i stay near airport there was lot of noise disturbance in my background so kept missing some points when plane flew. Just a request if Monique's mike can be little high volumed. Also found one hour to be very less for such topics.if session was around two hours learning would be great

Unfortunately the time zone calculator you used was incorrect and I logged in late. I think it might be better to leave people to work out BST for themselves.  So I can really comment overall. Also, it would have been good to draw it together after the breakout rooms.  People were left high and dry.

The whole session was very helpful thank you. I'm approaching this course in retrospect, my dog having passed a fortnight ago. I found a lot of truth in what Monique said. When I stopped panicking on the day she was euthanized, I got a proper connection and was able to carry out her wishes. It was beautiful.

I found the instructor to be not only knowledgeable but also kind and caring 
I look forward to future modules
Joanne Virginia USA

The guided meditation was so helpful as a first step to reconnecting with my soul mate, a 21 year old cat named Ohki whom I lost to kidney disease and old age 4 years ago. I am looking forward to the rest of the course and learning how to relieve the pain and guilt I still feel even after 4 years. The skills I’m learning will also help me with the 3 kitty souls in my care now. Also to know that kidney disease was not painful for Ohki is a relief to my heart and soul. Monique is an amazing human being sharing her gifts and knowledge with the world.

This is Isabel from Germany. The first session was amazing, Monique is such a wonderful, grounded and heart-oriented person and learning from her knowledge and experience about a topic that is not easy really is a gamechanger. I have gone through the worst pain and grief after putting down my soul cat two years ago and although I made some progress with it, Monique's course helps to do the rest of the necessary healing. Thank you so much
Superb. My only concern is the commercialization of the sacred medicine to large audiences void of its connection to the communities that honor it without making it into a commodity.

Fantastic introduction to communing with cacao! Florencia has a gift for communicating the heart of this sacred medicine. She reminds us to honor our intuition while paying immense gratitude to the original caretakers of sacred cacao.

Very informative and extremely helpful. I am looking forward to the learning and insight that this certification will provide.
Thank you,
Allen 
Talahassee, Florida
I found the course to be very helpful.  Appreciate the breakout room.

I have had to euthenize 4 beloved pets since 2017. At one point in the program I could not stop sobbing; still a lot of grief there for them. I now have a 15 year old rat terrier who's been with me since 2009, and KNOW he is next to go and want to be a bit more preparted. She is right about vets. Every time I take my terrier to the vet he says, "Well, he's getting up there...." and doesn't provide much support beyond the fact that he won't be around very long. And I ALREADY KNOW THAT So I get mad at him (the vet, not the dog.)
I’ve been through other course on the same theme and this one was, by far, the best. I wish all veterinarians could see even the first session.
Presenter and staff warm, professional, and helpful to those present.  Positive energies for learning.....looking forward with gratitude.
I hope it gets better as the weeks continue onward...
I found that he seemed rushed to cover the material.

Linda was very warm and inviting. I felt very comfortable with her. I have learned so much in just the first lesson. I am looking forward to the next module.
Peggy, USA
Very knowledgeable facilitator, great information and exercises.
Waiting for the deepening practices. Also, love it of course 💞

Techniques to separate the right and left hemisphere of the brain and utilizing the right brain to remote review unfiltered. 

The practices stood out real well! Fabulously conducted! Hope Shift Network will consider intermediate/ advance course on this!
When course first started, I was unsure of presenter but they won me over by end of class

As a remote viewer interested in developing my skills further, I absolutely loved the content and am very happy to be here.  The delivery of the material could be improved, as It felt rushed & a little unclear at times. I particularly disliked the 5-6 questions that were taken in the middle of the class - which resulted in us overrunning by 15 minutes, which reduced the time in the breakout rooms. I didn’t learn ANYTHING valuable from the questions asked (not the teachers fault) - they were ‘why did this happen to me?’ style questions which do not assist the wider group. Please can any  Q&A perhaps be kept till the end, the time spent on them reduced, or STRESSED that it’s about the specific CONTENT - not a ‘free for all?’ It reduced the time to learn and (for me) was excessive at 5-6 questions. Looking forward to exploring more in the weeks to come.  (Please do not use my feedback as a review, as it’s much too early for me to have formed an accurate opinion as yet, thank you,)

Alan is a creative, gifted, and talented teacher who has the ability to take us high into the ethers while keeping our feet firmly on the ground. I am honored and privileged to be a member of this class and I look forward to learning more about and contributing to the further development of this important and sacred field of study. Deborah, Oregon.

I am cathy from Liverpool, yes I really enjoyed the session, i popped on late, and missed the start, I was surprised that I have a lot of things already in place, what was recommended, I have been tuned with the dragons on my previous course, so definitely got guided here, also when I mentioned I had already got my anscestors mothers and grandmothers. On oracle cards from previously, I was again surprised, also  the card you mentioned was the magician, I got that card picked for me at 16.25, so it was clarifying it, I can't wait for me to be part of my next chapter with you all. Love cathy ❤️
I had an amazing experience! Learning with Alan is so much fun! Apart from the knowledge he shared, the learning process was interesting, interactive and felt natural and easy.  Lucy, Shanghai
I like the content, it is a fascinating topic. I would have liked to read the written information but the presentation was too fast. I am glad we can watch the recording soon.

Just the right balance of historical context, underlying principles, and experiential practice. 
Sharon,  Hertford,  NC

My name is Fawn and I am a practicing witch from British Columbia, Canada.  I have had the privilege of working with Linda Rauch previous to this course.  She is so incredibly knowledgeable and delivers information in a concise and interesting way.  She is laying the perfect foundation for those beginning their journey and those of us discovering more about being a witch.  She brings her personal stories which enhances the learning by making it real.  I cannot wait for next weeks adventure.

Really great stuff, I am a certified remote viewer in 3 modalities and I knew a lot of this stuff already, but if I were a new person, I can see how the presentation would have felt rushed a bit or hard to grasp as it moved really quickly for a novice in my opinion. I really enjoyed all the info he was presenting, I'm a big fan of Alan's, but just felt the energy of the pacing was very rushed without linking all the info together. And the breakout session wasn't explained well. The key to a great remote view is as much as the tasking and intention put forth for the viewer to do as much as it is the viewer, viewing. I had a great group and we put it altogether, and I got the target pretty close, but felt it was very rushed and that affected my abilitiy to hone into the target fully. So just would like to see better pacing and explanations, time management in the following classes to come. But loving the topic and Alan!
I love Alan’s enthusiasm and energy in addition to the inspiring information and insights he offers!
I love Jayme's clear descriptions and explanation, so easy to follow and examples.  The two hours flew by.  I also loved the initiation and have listened back to it to a few times.

The instructor is absolutely fantastic.  Very down to earth, approachable, practical.  Provided clear practical information as well as context and relevant stories.  Extremely professional and well done!!!
Very well organized and communicated content by Linda

"Approach that tree with caution, then up it boldly climb..." (Emily Dickinson.) As my initial caution melted, I felt an increasing joy as I recognized that Linda's teachings constellated around my own searching for  a spirituality that embraces the Presence of the Sacred Feminine, and a deep love for the earth with all the life she sustains. I sense that this program will take me further and deeper on my own journey. Anne Kathleen, Ontario, Canada

MaríaLuz, Chile
It was an interesting experience to practice remote viewing from the first session.  It’s amazing to be able to do something I considered was impossible for me.
Material came too fast and too sporadically. There wasn’t clarity on whether we would receive the slides from presentation.

To look at a situation from the animal companion‘a perspective and not our human one. 
To realize that we will still be connected to our loved pet even after their death.
I appreciated that she began with basics explaining the simplicity of the altar and how to start the process
Love the class - Alan is "real" - and the practices brought it home

I enjoyed the session. The presentation style, music, and overall energy of the session were welcoming and had a lasting impact. I appreciate the combination of information and practical experience.
Looking forward to the next module. Thank you.

I was unable to attend this event, because its start time overlapped with John Stuart Reid's class, for which I had already registered (and paid).  I'd hoped there would be a recording of this one. <sigh>  Please let me know if there is one!
Alan Steinfeld is so real. The topic is thrilling! It was amazing to see how many hits I and others in our break-out session had in trying to identify a hidden target. I thought “wow this is for me!”
Thank you
Alan's depth of knowledge and experience about the subject matter is refreshing. I very much appreciated hat the course started and ended on time, and that the materials were posted as agreed.
I really enjoyed the neutral and wave of relief techniques in these first module.
The session was good although the video replay was quite glitchy and jumping forward.

When I viewed the module through my computer ( as per my iPad device) , the volume was incredibly low and even after I made all my speakers and setting adjustments in the max I still couldn’t hear the replay well….
I enjoyed Module One, it has lit a fire in my belly to learn more and more! Linda's pragmatic and down to earth teaching style and philosophy is really refreshing.
First module is informative;  I did not view any object remotely.  So far I will continue to Module 2 hopefully there is an improvement.  thanks.  I enjoyed it Great presentation
It was amazing that with the directions we were given, I was able to begin the process of remote viewing.  I didn't think I had any ability to do so yet.  I'm very excited to see what comes next!

The image of using the ocean wave to regulate the in and out breathing was new for me as live in Alberta , Canada. A refreshing review of  Heart Math  science and techniques that I have shared with my clients since the early 1990's.
Excellent. Clear, well structured and well presented. It's a very difficult topic to have explained so well. Thank you.

I am so thankful that I signed up for this course. And thank you for presenting it. We are so connected in so many ways with our animals and the world around us. I am grateful to receive the tools and resources that helps us on our journey to better understand and assist our beautiful souls that share their time and knowledge with us. It is a pleasure and with deep thanks that you are here to show us the way. Jacqueline - Washington State

Shirley. Logan, Utah.  
I loved Jacobs relaxed authentic pace. He and I have worked together before and he’s always consistently Jacob. It relaxes me just to be in his presence.

It was lovely to enjoy the sweet peaceful aspect of Dr. Jacob. 
I didn't get much from his talk, perhaps because it was in some part the talk he had given initially to build interest for the course.
The meditation we did was very powerful and had imbedded elements and concepts that were new and interesting.

I found that I felt very peaceful during this module and loved the guided visualization.   Am looking forward to the next module.  Thank you!
Mary from TX

I enjoyed listening to Jason and understanding more of my journey through his simplied explanations that resonated with me and intend to embrace and practice his suggestions along the course.  

Being able to hear others sharing their stories is a great bonus as one doesn't feel quite so alone on this journey and having a facebook community to be part during the course is great.

Not a state of mind, but a state of no-mind.  ....  Einstein's theory of relativity - "happened while he was playing the violin".  .... First impression and feeling is always correct..... the sparkle moves us when we're not looking ........We know what we need to know by Heart. .... Life provides us with what we need.  ....... See what's catching your eye.   ....... To Padma, "You have a Beautiful Heart."
This first class was exquisite.

I came across the book "Light the An medicine of future", by accident, later on
happened to read Luminous living and Take of your Glasses and see, ever since then I have pretty much liked the concepts preached by Jacob, I myself an Optometrist and someone who has keen interest in practicing Binocular vision and vision therapy, I look forward for the next sessions
Not enough substance. It will get better.

I am Elisabeth from South Germany and enjoyed the inzetesting  background story - even it was in the middle of the night for me. As I get no visual image I will have to repeat the mirror exercises to get a feeling contact - i look foreward to the work and greet you with gratitude

Aloha. I love the feeling of lightness and effortless freedom that come after hearing Jacob speak. His concepts are easy yet profound. “Awareness is curative” and “Nothing to do but allow” are concepts that I find super refreshing. Mahalo 💖

I was glad the moderator was willing to go over time rather than by the clock.  I appreciate the intro remarks by the moderator about our privacy.  I continue to find the integrity of Shift Network to be outstanding in being clear, professional and helpful to the participants.  Iona Greenfield, Massachusetts

A lot of what Jacob said was a repeat of information he provided in the pre-class interview and in most any other video presentations I've seen him give. I appreciated the experiential component of the class. I found off-putting the people-seeking-personal-healing turn taken during the Q & A. Not what I expected or signed up for. I'll try one more week before deciding whether or not to request a refund. Thanks for asking!

As I look back on the summary description of Module 1, I hardly recognize those bullet points from the lesson.  It's a stretch.  I'm reserving my assessment for later in the course.  Maybe this was a warmup. 
My few takeaways:  There is a part of us that learns without effort.  It happens when we stop looking for it. Life is looking for you
That which is noticing is silent - it has no point of view.  
Something is moving you to your maximum potential - it is not moving to you but from you.

Jacob is amazing at helping me come back to my actual design so that I can follow the intelligence of life in what life wants to do through me. He is so good at it because he is what he teaches.
Kevin, Ashburn, VA

I disagreed with a few things, and that told me this was perfect for me, because it gave me new things to consider (even if my mind was not necessarily changed, but it was at least challenged, and was given the opportunity to consider a different aspect or two). And the challenge meant growth. It was a pleasant session to hear, and I feel it contributes to my continuing education as a companion animal end-of-life doula, and former vet tech. For the first time in my life, I didn't feel guilty when I gave the anger and sadness back to my parents and my daughter. I realized that until now, I felt responsible for their feelings and emotions. It's not just a feeling, but a belief that I am responsible for other peoples feelings and it is my fault if they don't feel well. Then I have failed and I feel guilty and ashamed. My parents had this belief unconsciously and their parents and so on. And now my daughter as well. The other part of the pattern is that I learned that my feelings are bad. Now I'm learning to take care of my emotions and feelings and not to repress or suppress them; to embrace them lovingly. It's a real challenge, because it was a survival strategy. At times I feel lower back pain. I now know, that I must have repressed emotions when I feel pain in my lower back, but I don't know what happened or how. After giving loving attention to my back, I come to know the part of me that is in need of loving attention; mostly a very young part of me. I know it is a pattern and not truth, but my nervous system goes into freeze; it doesn't feel safe. 
 It is not possible to judge your emotions and feelings and take responsibility for them, at the same time. When people don't take responsibility for their own emotions and feelings, then they blame other people for them.

Today was profound.  Even though I am honestly wary of some concepts such as our souls choosing things, or that we can all heal anything.  Even if we can, the spiritual gaslighting that can happen, the toxic positivity, the flippant blame if you are someone who cannot or did not yet, I find troubling and a symptom of our colonial patriarchal culture's inability to view chronic illness and disability as anything other than those whose lives are disposable waste, a deserved fate for individual "weakness".  And I do believe that a lot of disability is constructed by society and the physical and care barriers that have been put in place.  I will trust Skylar that anything can be healed, and I also believe that healing should be a community and cultural effort as it is often something that happens in a community that causes the disconnection and pain.  I understand that many Indigenous cultures view healing illness as a responsibility of the collective, and this is also an emphasis of Disability Justice work.  But...I have learned not to throw the baby out with the bathwater!  And I think I am musing right now on how to connect these different areas of my life:  collective care, Disability Justice, and individual powers to heal self or others.
